channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Administration eyeing $400M settlement from TikTok for DC 'beautification': Sources
item.description: The administration is nearing a $400 million TikTok settlement over alleged children's privacy violations, which would fund D.C. "beautification" proj...

item.title: 5 states monitoring passengers who departed ship stricken by hantavirus
item.description: American passengers who left the MV Hondius cruise ship in April are being monitored for hantavirus in at least five states, health officials said.

item.title: Alabama Republicans look to set new US House primaries if courts allow redistricting
item.description: Alabama lawmakers are set to vote on a measure that could change the state’s congressional primaries as part of a bid to switch its U.S. House distric...

item.title: Extended interview: Lizzo
item.description: Lizzo sits down with "CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King to discuss her third album, "Bitch," and how it reflects her current state in life, her ongoing...
